key.name: toggle-launcher
key.summary: Shortcut to open/close the launcher

key.name: launcher-width
key.summary: Width of the launcher window in pixels

key.name: max-results
key.summary: Maximum number of results to display

key.name: show-overlay
key.summary: Show dark overlay behind the launcher window

key.name: show-panel-indicator
key.summary: Show Kapit icon in the top panel

key.name: enable-windows
key.summary: Show open windows in results

key.name: enable-clipboard
key.summary: Enable clipboard history provider (disabled by default)

key.name: clipboard-max-history
key.summary: Maximum number of clipboard history entries to keep

key.name: enable-apps
key.summary: Show installed applications in results

key.name: enable-files
key.summary: Show files in results

key.name: enable-process
key.summary: Enable process search provider (disabled by default, trigger: proc)

key.name: enable-calculator
key.summary: Show calculator results

key.name: enable-web
key.summary: Show web search result

key.name: file-search-paths
key.summary: Paths to search for files

key.name: custom-themes
key.summary: User-defined color themes (JSON)

key.name: scan-max-depth
key.summary: Max directory depth for filesystem scan on non-Tracker paths

key.name: scan-max-results
key.summary: Max file results per scanned path

key.name: web-search-engine
key.summary: Web search engine URL template. Use {query} as placeholder.

key.name: web-search-label
key.summary: Display name of the web search engine

key.name: terminal-app
key.summary: Terminal emulator binary to use for running commands

key.name: text-prefix-char
key.summary: Character used to prefix provider filter keywords, e.g. /file, /app

key.name: provider-order
key.summary: Custom provider display order (JSON array of provider IDs)

key.name: results-recent-first
key.summary: Show most recently used results first when launcher opens

key.name: color-theme
key.summary: Color theme: 'system', 'dark', 'muted', 'light', 'soft', or 'pastel'

key.name: show-section-headers
key.summary: Show provider section headers between result groups

key.name: shortcuts
key.summary: Custom launch shortcuts (JSON)
